name: Strategic Storage Trust VI, Inc.
summary: PART I Formation and Corporate Structure Strategic Storage Trust VI, Inc., a Maryland corporation (the Company), was formed on October 14, 2020 under the Maryland General Corporation Law for the purpose of engaging in the business of investing in self storage facilities and commenced formal operations on March 10, 2021.
